query: SELECT ac.id, ac.accountId, ac.contactId, ac.phoneNumber, ac.status, ac.startedAt, c.firstName, c.lastName FROM ai_calls ac LEFT JOIN contacts c ON ac.contactId = c.id ORDER BY ac.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT ac.id, ac.accountId, ac.contactId, ac.phoneNumber, ac.status, ac.startedAt, c.firstName, c.lastName FROM ai_calls ac LEFT JOIN contacts c ON ac.contactId = c.id ORDER BY ac.id DESC LIMIT 5;
